## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic session between Exec and GrowthX Labs to discuss SEO strategy and content planning.](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has conducted extensive keyword research and competitor gap analysis, identifying numerous opportunities in AI-related and enterprise-focused topics](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Exec to review and prioritize keyword clusters in Airtable, focusing on sales enablement and employee development](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Content strategy aims to optimize for both human search and AI answer engines, emphasizing niche topics and strategic keyword placement](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [First calibration articles expected early next week, ramping up to full content capacity shortly after](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

## Topics

### SEO Strategy Overview

  - [90% of current Exec traffic is branded, indicating significant growth potential](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [AI-related search queries are generally less competitive at present](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Identified key competitors in AI training space: AI Hyperbound and others](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Focus on enterprise-targeted keywords, avoiding individual career development topics](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating content that ranks well for both human searches and AI answer engine queries](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Content Planning Process

  - [Using Airtable for keyword tracking and content planning](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Clusters include: Sales Enablement, Employee Development, Communication Skills, Leadership, and Soft Skills](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Sean to review and prioritize keywords, marking them as "ready to start" in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Initial focus on sales enablement and employee development clusters](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Aim to create content for highly specific, niche keywords to optimize for AI search engines](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### AI Search Optimization Tactics

  - [Place desired topics at the top of listicles for better AI engine recognition](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Create separate, highly specific articles to support multi-step AI search processes](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Leverage the expanded search capabilities of AI to target extremely niche content areas](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### Content Production Workflow

  - [GrowthX to prepare initial calibration articles for brand voice and tone approval](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Aim to ramp up to full content capacity on a weekly basis](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Flexible content budget allows for high-volume, quality content production](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)

### Additional Insights

  - [Discussed potential for "Learning and Development" as a future cluster](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
  - [Shared insights from Poise.com acquisition, highlighting potential for leadership meeting preparation content](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
  - [Noted the ineffectiveness of real-time AI coaching during live conversations, reinforcing Exec's async practice model](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sean to review and prioritize keywords in Airtable using AI assistance](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare and send first calibration articles by early next week](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Aim to reach full content production capacity within 2-4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up to review initial content and adjust strategy as needed](https://fathom.video/share/TvvnxdzxUcPyEwQbJ2xSx89W-sehfo3H?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
